allow: PowerShell($angular = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c npx ng serve --port 4200" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\Machine\\Machine" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "Angular PID: $\($angular.Id\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\Machine\\BACKEND" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "Backend PID: $\($p.Id\)")
